description: A funky, fashionable choice from Inc. 5, with it's sleek design and stylish straps, this pair looks great with day or party wear.  The colourful strap in suede will perfectly complement ethnic or Western outfits.UpperSmooth footbed with metallic tonesThong styled shape with colourful synthetic suede straps from midfoot to centreCrystal embellishments at the centre of the thong strapsHas a toe separator to comfortably hold the foot in placeOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with upraised heelTerraced grooves on the heel for ultimate grip Sandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
